query:
SELECT
                COUNT(*) AS "count!: i64",
                MIN(detected_at) AS "first_ms?: i64",
                MAX(detected_at) AS "last_ms?: i64",
                SUM(CASE WHEN detected_at >= $1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "recent_count!: i64"
              FROM detections
              WHERE snippet_path IS NULL
